tool.name: correlate_static_dynamic
tool.description:
Promote SAST-imported findings to CONFIRMED when dynamic agents proved them.
Walks UNCONFIRMED findings (imported via import_sarif), matches each against CONFIRMED dynamic findings by vuln_type + endpoint + title. When both agree, boosts confidence and promotes to CONFIRMED. Core of static-dynamic correlation for white-box scans.

parameter.name: min_confidence_boost
parameter.description: Minimum match score to promote. Default 0.3.

tool.name: build_target_map
tool.description:
Build Target Map for multi-target scans — correlate source code route handlers with live URLs.
Greps Express/FastAPI/Django/Flask/Spring/Laravel/Rails routes in source files and matches to live URLs. Writes /workspace/target_map.json. White-box agents use this to pivot between static review ('this file implements that endpoint') and dynamic testing.

parameter.name: code_paths
parameter.description: Paths to scan for code. Default /workspace.

parameter.name: live_urls
parameter.description: Live URLs from recon to correlate.

tool.name: analyze_sca_reachability
tool.description:
Reachability analysis for SCA findings — check if CVE's vulnerable function is actually called from app code.
Given regex patterns matching the vulnerable function (e.g., 'yaml.load\\(' for PyYAML CVE), finds all callers in the codebase and determines whether any caller is reachable from an entry point. Half of SCA findings are unreachable library code — this filters them out.

parameter.name: vulnerable_function_patterns
parameter.description: Regex patterns for the vulnerable function calls (e.g., ['yaml\\.load\\(', 'pickle\\.loads\\(']).

parameter.name: entry_points
parameter.description: Custom entry point markers. Defaults cover common patterns.
